extra.reason: FastAPI server scaffolded: server.py with health endpoint, uvicorn entry point, REPO_CACHE_DIR config, BareCloneManager wired at startup. Dependencies added to pyproject.toml.
Implemented Analyzer protocol + run_pipeline() pass-through loop with ANALYZERS=[] for v1. 8 new tests, full suite (31) passing. Committed 1a07e06.
All Phase 1 children complete: bare clone manager, file overlap, ConflictResult, merge-tree wrapper, integration tests, and analysis pipeline loop. Core engine done.
Changed build-backend to 'setuptools.build_meta'. Verified: 'uv run python -c import git_lookout' now builds the editable install successfully, and full test suite (31 tests) passes.

Implemented SQLite schema in git_lookout/storage/schema.py: all four tables (repositories, pull_requests, pr_files, conflict_checks) with idx_pr_files_path index, PRAGMA-based migration setup (user_version), foreign keys enabled, idempotent connect(). 11 tests in tests/storage/test_schema.py covering tables, index, cascade, uniqueness, and the overlap pre-filter query.
Implemented GitHub App auth (JWT + cached installation tokens) and REST client with list_open_prs / changed_files, both paginated via Link header. 17 tests via httpx.MockTransport.

Implemented reconciliation sweep: storage/queries.py (PR upsert/delete, pr_files replace, tracked-PR listing), sweep.py (reconcile_repo/reconcile_all + SweepResult, default-branch filtering, file-fetch only on new/stale PRs), and server.py background asyncio interval loop (SWEEP_INTERVAL_SECONDS, default 300; runs immediately on startup). 74 tests pass.
Done as part of git-lookout-bc9 (Reconciliation sweep): server.py runs the sweep on a background asyncio loop on startup and every SWEEP_INTERVAL_SECONDS (default 300).
